info.title: Cloudlab Portal API
info.description: This document describes the Cloudlab Portal API.

user.description: The name of the user that owns the token

expires_at.description: The expiration time as an ISO 8601 string, if any.

issued_at.description: The issue time as an ISO 8601 string.

Auth0TokenRequest.description: Auth0 request structure for redeeming a token by code

name.description: A human readable name for the experiment .

project.description: The project the experiment is instantiated in.

group.description: The project subgroup the experiment is instantiated in.

profile_id.description: ID of the profile used to create the experiment

profile_name.description: Human readable name of the profile.

profile_project.description: Human readable name of the profile project

created_at.description: The creation time of the experiment

start_at.description: The time the experiment is scheduled to start at

stop_at.description: The time the experiment is scheduled to stop at

started_at.description: The time the experiment was actually started

expires_at.description: The current expiration time of the experiment (will be auto reaped)

wbstore_id.description: The ID of the experiments WB store.

url.description: The URL of the Portal status page

repository_url.description: The URL of the repository (for repo backed profiles)

repository_refspec.description: The refspec of the experiment (for repo backed profiles)

repository_hash.description: The commit hash of the experiment (for repo backed profiles)

bindings.description: Bindings applied to the profile as a JSON string

aggregates.description: List of aggregates in the experiment

last_snapshot_status.description: Status for most recent snapshot request

sshpubkey.description: Additional ssh public key for the experiment

name.description: A human readable name for the experiment

project.description: The project the experiment is instantiated in.

group.description: The project subgroup the experiment is instantiated in.

profile_project.description: The name of the profile project

start_at.description: Schedule experiment to start at a future time

stop_at.description: Schedule experiment to stop at a future time

paramset_name.description: Optional name of a parameter set to apply to the profile

paramset_owner.description: The owner of the parameter set

bindings.description: Optional bindings to apply to the profile as a JSON object

refspec.description: For a repository based profile, optionally specify a refspec[:hash] to use instead of the HEAD of the default branch

sshpubkey.description: Additional ssh public key for the experiment.

bindings.description: Bindings to apply to the profile as a JSON string

name.description: Human readable name of the aggregate.

nodes.description: List of nodes at the aggregate

ExtensionRequest.description: Extend a running experiment, with a duration, additional number of hours, or an explicit end time

expires_at.description: Set the experiment expiration to GMT Date/Time

extend_by.description: Number of hours to add to the current experiment expiration

reason.description: Pithy description of why you need these resources for longer

rawstate.description: Current raw state of the node

startup_status.description: Current status of the startup  execution service

UpdateAggregateNode.description: Perform operational action on a node in an experiment

SnapshotRequest.description: Parameters for taking an image snapshot of a node

image_name.description: The name of the image to create or update

id.description: Unique identifier of the snapshot request

image_size.description: Current size of the image in KB

error_message.description: Error message when snapshot_status indicates failure

name.summary: Radio(s) located in the indoor OTA lab
Radio(s) located in the Flux area

id.description: Unique identifier of the reservation group

reason.description: Pithy description of why you want to reserve these resources

project.description: The project of the reservation group

group.description: The project subgroup of the reservation group

start_at.description: Resgroup start time. When creating a resgroup this can be left unset, which means the resgroup should start immediately. When modifying a resgroup, the start time can be changed until the resgroup is approved.

expires_at.description: Resgroup expiration time. When supplied (instead of a duration), this must be later then start_at. When modifying a resgroup, the expiration can be changed until the resgroup is approved. Once the resgroup is approved, the expiration can be moved earlier, but not later.

ResGroupSearch.description: A cloudlab reservation group search request

project.description: The project of the reservation group

group.description: The project subgroup of the reservation group

ResGroupSearchResult.description: Start/End where a resgroup will fit

ResGroupError.description: Errors returned when creating/modifying a reservation group

error.description: Error message regarding this reservation group

errorCode.description: Error code regarding this reservation group

ResGroupNodeTypes.description: A list of cluster reservation requests

resgroup_id.description: Unique identifier of the reservation group

reservation_id.description: Unique identifier of the reservation group reservation at the remote cluster

count.description: Number of nodes, if a node type

resgroup_id.description: Unique identifier of the reservation group

reservation_id.description: Unique identifier of this range reservation

min_freq.description: The start of the frequency range (inclusive) that this grant includes (MHz).

max_freq.description: The end of the frequency range (inclusive) that this grant includes (MHz).

ResGroupRanges.description: A list of range reservation requests

resgroup_id.description: Unique identifier of the reservation group

reservation_id.description: Unique identifier of this route reservation

ResGroupRoutes.description: A list of route reservation requests

ResGroupReservation.description: When adding a reservation to a group, think of this as a Union, so supply only one of nodetype, range, or route at a time.

repository_url.description: The URL of the repository (for repo backed profiles)

repository_refspec.description: The refspec of the profile (for repo backed profiles)

repository_hash.description: The commit hash of the profile (for repo backed profiles)

repository_githook.description: The Portal URL of the repository githook

public.description: The profile can be instantiated by any user

project_writable.description: The profile can be modified by other members of its project

current_version.description: The current version of the profile

id.description: Unique identifier of the profile version

updater.description: The name of the profile updater

public.description: The profile can be instantiated by any user

project_writable.description: The profile can be modified by other members of its project

repository_url.description: Optional URL of the repository (for repo backed profiles)

script.description: The GENI lib python script (when not repo backed)

project_writable.description: The profile can modified by other members of its project

XApiTokenOptional.name: X-Api-Token
XApiTokenOptional.description: Identifies the calling user; optional in this case

XApiElaborate.name: X-Api-Elaborate
XApiElaborate.description: If set to `true`, returned objects will include all info from related child objects.  If unset or set to any other value, returned objects will include abbreviated objects for related children.

ClientNodeID.name: client_id

schema.description: The client name of a node

ClientNodeID.description: The client name of a node

ResGroupReservationID.name: reservation_id
ResGroupReservationID.description: The target reservation in a reservation group

get.description: Display calling token's (X-Api-Token header value) metadata.

put.description: Refresh calling token (X-Api-Token header value). Caller token must be valid (not yet expired). A new token is returned and the calling token is revoked, be sure to save the new token!

post.description: Redeem code for an auth0 user token

201.description: A signed Powder JWT token string

429.description: Load average too high or too many experiments waiting

put.description: Extend a running experiment, with a duration, number of additional hours, or an explicit end time

get.description: Retrieve manifests for a running experiment.

post.description: Connect a shared vlan in an experiment to another experiment's shared vlan.

parameters.description: The client id of the lan in the source expedriment
